meta.title: Technology | NexGen
meta.description: The fully loaded OpenClaw tech ecosystem — Mem0 memory, SearXNG search, browser automation.
pageSubtitle: Months of research and deep integration, with every component rigorously tested. This isn’t stock OpenClaw — this is a complete AI ecosystem.
sections.openclaw.name: OpenClaw
sections.openclaw.headline: The world’s #1 open-source AI agent framework
sections.openclaw.body: 200,000+ GitHub Stars, used by 2 million people weekly worldwide. We’ve deeply customized this platform with a full plugin ecosystem, building a system that goes far beyond the original.
sections.mem0.name: Mem0 + Qdrant
sections.mem0.headline: Vector-powered permanent memory — the AI’s most powerful brain
sections.mem0.body: This isn’t ChatGPT’s 100-memory limit. Built on Qdrant vector database + Mem0 memory engine, it remembers everything you’ve ever said. A preference you mentioned three months ago? It remembers. The more you use it, the smarter it gets.
sections.searxng.name: SearXNG
sections.searxng.headline: Bypass AI search blocks — a true web search engine
sections.searxng.body: ChatGPT’s search is blocked by countless websites — Reddit, forums, many news sites. SearXNG is a self-hosted meta-search engine that bypasses all AI search restrictions, delivering real-time results from across the web. What ChatGPT can’t find, it can.
sections.chromium.name: Chromium Headless
sections.chromium.headline: AI operates the browser for you — beyond chat, real action
sections.chromium.body: A headless browser automation engine. AI directly controls the browser to fill forms, compare prices, make reservations, grab tickets, and check reviews. It doesn’t just answer questions — it gets things done. (Elite plan exclusive)
sections.docker.name: Docker
sections.docker.headline: Containerized one-click deployment — stable and reliable
sections.docker.body: The entire system is deployed as Docker containers. Fully isolated environment, secure and stable, launched with a single command. Your system runs independently, and when migration is needed, everything packs up cleanly with all data preserved.
sections.acpx.name: ACPX
sections.acpx.headline: ACP protocol runtime environment
sections.acpx.body: When multiple AIs work simultaneously, they need to communicate and coordinate. ACPX enables real-time task distribution so they never duplicate effort.
sections.clawteam.name: ClawTeam
sections.clawteam.headline: Multi-agent collaboration framework
sections.clawteam.body: Multiple AI agents running independently and working in parallel, handling different tasks simultaneously. One researches, another writes reports — without interference.
sections.watchdog.name: Gateway Watchdog
sections.watchdog.headline: Auto-recovery daemon
sections.watchdog.body: 24/7 connection monitoring system. Automatically detects disconnections and reconnects, with multi-node failover to ensure your service never goes down.
privacy.title: Data Privacy
privacy.body: Your conversation history and memory are stored on your own server — we never log or store them. AI model calls use an encrypted API channel to ensure secure communication.
